task_completion.description: The file is saved with the correct name.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The LibreCAD window title or a save dialog displays 'reflected_ceiling_plan.dxf'.

task_completion.description: The required layers are created with correct colors.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The layer list panel in LibreCAD shows 'ROOM' (White/Black depending on theme), 'CEILING-GRID' (Gray), and 'LIGHTING' (Yellow).
A large rectangular outline representing the 6000x4800 mm room is visible in the drawing area.

task_completion.description: The ceiling grid is drawn inside the room.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A grid of horizontal and vertical lines is visible inside the room outline, representing the 600 mm spacing.

task_completion.description: Six lighting fixtures are drawn as squares with an 'X' inside.
task_completion.visual_evidence: There are six square symbols in the drawing, and each square contains two diagonal lines connecting opposite corners to form an 'X'.

task_completion.description: The lighting fixtures are placed in the correct arrangement.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The six lighting fixtures are arranged in two horizontal rows of three, positioned symmetrically within the room outline.

integrity.description: The agent used the LibreCAD GUI to create the drawing.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with LibreCAD's drawing tools, layer panel, and command line, rather than just a terminal window running a script to generate the file.

integrity.description: The agent did not manually write the DXF file in a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: The drawing was created visually in LibreCAD, not by typing DXF codes into a text editor.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires creating a reflected ceiling plan in LibreCAD saved as '/home/ga/Documents/LibreCAD/reflected_ceiling_plan.dxf'. The drawing must have three layers: 'ROOM' (White/Index 7), 'CEILING-GRID' (Gray/Index 8), and 'LIGHTING' (Yellow/Index 2). The room is 6000x4800 mm. The grid has 600 mm spacing. There are 6 lighting fixtures (600x600 mm squares with an 'X' inside) arranged in 2 rows of 3 at specific coordinates: (1000,1600), (3000,1600), (5000,1600) and (1000,3200), (3000,3200), (5000,3200).
